ddls:
CREATE TABLE "documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of the document (e.g., SPEC SHEET) */,
  "document_title" TEXT /* Title of the document */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the document content */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the document was last updated */,
  "view_count" INTEGER /* Number of views the document has received */,
  "download_count" INTEGER /* Number of downloads the document has received */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Physical path or URL of the document */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the document */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the document was first created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the document */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags associated with the document for better searchability */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the document (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., employee, partner, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the document */,
  "document_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the document was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_document_id FOREIGN KEY ("document_id") REFERENCES documents ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (for hierarchical structures) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the category is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_category_mapping" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping entry */,
  "document_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the document belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_category_mapping_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES document_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_category_mapping_document_id FOREIGN KEY ("document_id") REFERENCES documents ("document_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "document_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document that triggered the notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date of the notification */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., update, new document) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., sent, failed) */,
  "sent_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who sent the notification */,
  "subject" TEXT /* Subject of the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_notifications_document_id FOREIGN KEY ("document_id") REFERENCES documents ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "download_history" (
  "download_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each download entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who downloaded the document */,
  "document_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document downloaded */,
  "download_date" TEXT /* Date when the document was downloaded */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the download occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("download_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_download_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_download_history_document_id FOREIGN KEY ("document_id") REFERENCES documents ("document_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version entry */,
  "document_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the document */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date of this version update */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Summary of changes made in this version */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the version */,
  "reviewed_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who reviewed the version */,
  "review_status" TEXT /* Review status of the version (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_versions_document_id FOREIGN KEY ("document_id") REFERENCES documents ("document_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "email_templates" (
  "template_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each email template */,
  "template_name" TEXT /* Name of the template */,
  "subject" TEXT /* Subject line of the email */,
  "body" TEXT /* Body content of the email */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the template is active */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the template */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the template was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("template_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_email_templates_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date of the log entry */,
  "log_type" TEXT /* Type of log (e.g., error, info) */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message detailing the log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User ID associated with the log entry */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the log entry was generated */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_system_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role's permissions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the tag is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_tags" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document */,
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id", "tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)
